paper_title: LLaMA: Open and Efficient Foundation Language Models

raw_extraction.innovation: LLaMA introduces a series of efficient, open-source language models trained on publicly available data using a scalable pre-training approach with improved architectures including pre-normalization, SwiGLU activation, and rotary position embeddings
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: CommonCrawl, C4, Wikipedia, Books, GitHub, ArXiv, StackExchange
raw_extraction.application: Natural language understanding, question answering, text generation, instruction following
raw_extraction.research_problem: Achieve state-of-the-art performance on language understanding tasks with accessible, open-source models
raw_extraction.extension: Uses pre-normalization, SwiGLU activation function, and rotary position embeddings to improve training stability and performance
